dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5974 IH: Bureau of Prisons Pay Protection Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Pettersen (for herself and Mr. Neguse) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Appropriations

form.official-title: To provide funding for personnel of Bureau of Prisons facilities.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Bureau of Prisons Pay Protection Act.

section.header: Funding for personnel of Bureau of Prison facilities
section.text: Out of any money in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, there is appropriated such sums as are necessary to pay, during any period of a lapse in discretionary appropriations during any fiscal year, the salaries of the personnel, both correctional and non-correctional, of a facility of the Bureau of Prisons during such lapse.
